reach solicitors who use that sitePoliceStationRepUKDirectory.comAll 3 placements included — completely free whilst testingFeatured Representative Statistics5xMore profile views on average87%Featured reps get contacted firstInstantAuto-activation when you applyApply for Featured StatusAll tiers completely free whilst testing✨ No payment required — just apply and get approvedBasic FeaturedGet priority placement in search resultsFREEwhilst testing✨ No payment requiredPriority placement in searchesFeatured badge on profileDisplay website URLEmail supportCancel anytimeApply for FreeMost PopularPremium FeaturedStand out with enhanced visibilityFREEwhilst testing✨ No payment requiredTop 3 placement guaranteePremium badge (purple crown)Display website URLCustom promotional taglinePriority email supportCancel anytimeApply for FreeSpotlightMaximum visibility and exposureFREEwhilst testing✨ No payment required#1 placement (always at the top)Gold spotlight badge with animationOwn dedicated profile pageRevolving homepage spotlight carouselRevolving advert on partner directory homepageExtended promotional messageDisplay website & social linksDedicated account managerPriority support (24hr response)Cancel anytimeApply for FreeWhy Go Featured?Priority PlacementAppear above standard listings in all searchesMore EnquiriesFeatured reps get contacted 5x more oftenInstant ActivationAuto-activated immediately when you applyNo CommitmentFree to apply, no obligationsWhat Our Featured Reps Say"Within 2 weeks of going Spotlight, my bookings tripled. The homepage carousel and partner directory really work!"Sarah JohnsonAccredited Rep, London"Having my own dedicated page means I can showcase my experience properly. Firms actually read it before calling."Michael ChenDuty Solicitor, Manchester"Free testing offer is incredible value. The triple exposure is insane - I'm fully booked weeks in advance now."Emma WilliamsPolice Station Rep, BirminghamFrequently Asked QuestionsHow quickly does my featured status activate?Instantly! Simply click "Apply for Free" on any tier and your profile is auto-activated immediately. No waiting, no approval process - it's completely automatic during our free testing period.What does "own dedicated page" mean for Spotlight tier?You get a full standalone profile page (not just a card) with extended bio, portfolio, testimonials, and more space to showcase your experience and expertise.Where exactly does the homepage spotlight carousel appear?Your profile rotates in a featured carousel at the very top of our homepage on PoliceStationRepUK.co.uk - it's the first thing every visitor sees when they land on the site.What is the partner directory revolving advert?You get a rotating featured advert placement on the homepage of PoliceStationRepUKDirectory.com (our partner directory). This doubles your reach to firms who use that platform as well.Do all three placements run at the same time?Yes! Your dedicated page is always live, and you appear in both homepage carousels (ours and our partner's) simultaneously. Triple exposure with one subscription.Can I change my tier?Yes. Contact us and we'll help you change your featured tier at any time.Do I need a standard profile first?Yes. You need to create a free basic profile before applying for any featured tier.How do I apply?Simply click "Apply for Free" on any tier above and your profile will be auto-activated immediately. No email required, no waiting - it's instant! For any support questions, email robertcashman@defencelegalservices.co.ukReady to Get More Work?Apply now — completely free whilst testingCreate Profile First Questions?
